name: Eekso — The Base
dmNotes: EXPLORE BED for the main floor — leave it running while they wander. Nothing here attacks; the job is 'many owners, long dead' plus two exits: the garden (northeast, lure) and the stairwell (northwest, blood). The stairwell blood is the floor's key clue: it goes DOWN and was never cleaned. Let them find it themselves.

music.label: Wandering the halls
music.file: music/Borislav Slavov - Quirky Bones - Murky Version.mp3

music.label: What's left of it
music.file: music/Kelsey Woods - Music Under the Mountain.mp3

scriptText:
# The Base

- Past the foyer the fortress opens up: a pillared spine corridor, rooms hanging off it in every direction

- Everything repurposed at least twice — guardroom → pantry → bunkroom → stripped for the wood

- Quiet the way only big stone rooms get quiet: your footsteps come back a half-second late

## West — Old Dining Hall

- Trestle tables collapsed under their own weight; one still set for a meal

- **Three or four old campsites**, layered, from different years

- Worn-through boots left neatly side by side; bone dice, pips worn smooth

## Northeast — Something Green

{{music:moody}}

- The air gets **warmer** down the eastern side

- It smells like water and green growing things — impossible this deep

- Light from somewhere ahead. Not torchlight. Softer. Even.

> [!dm] Hook for **'The Garden'** — switch scenes when they commit.

## Northwest — The Stairwell

{{music:blood}}

A wide supply stairwell — up, and down. And on the landing, there is blood.

Not a spatter. A long, deliberate smear, dragged from the middle of the floor to the top step of the *downward* stair, and on down out of the light. Old and black. And underneath it, older stains in the same track. This has happened many times.

> [!dm]
> - **Medicine / Survival DC 12:** the drag mark is *bodies*, plural, over a long stretch of time
> - **Investigation DC 15:** the downward steps are worn smooth; the upward steps aren't. Everything in Eekso goes **down**.
>
> **Up** → 'The Top Floor' · **Down** → 'The Pitfall Prison'

ideas.text: Every room repurposed at least twice — the fortress reads like sediment, not architecture
None of the old campsites show anyone packing up and leaving. They just stop.
The downward stairs are worn smooth; the upward stairs aren't. Everything in Eekso goes down.
The garden announces itself as warmth and the smell of water before anyone sees a leaf

entities.name: The dragged blood on the stairwell landing
entities.note: Layered stains, many bodies, always downward. Never cleaned.

entities.name: Layered travellers' camps
entities.note: Decades of shelterers. No camp shows a departure.

entities.name: Warm air and green smell (east)
entities.note: The lure. Leads to The Garden.
